modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Reply All fails with mixed EABSSC.USD.EDU email addresses.

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to use the Reply All feature in Outlook, but it just wasn’t working. They noticed it only happens when there are recipients with those @eabssc.usd.edu addresses mixed in with others. It’s a bit frustrating since they rely on that function for group emails.
short_description: Reply All fails with mixed EABSSC.USD.EDU email addresses.
description: So, the user was trying to use the Reply All feature in Outlook, but it just wasn’t working. They noticed it only happens when there are recipients with those @eabssc.usd.edu addresses mixed in with others. It’s a bit frustrating since they rely on that function for group emails.
